message:
feat(icons): centralize agent icons and add to all displays

- Mayor: 🎩 (top hat)
- Deacon: 🦉 (owl)
- Witness: 👁 (eye)
- Refinery: 🏭 (factory)
- Crew: 🧑‍💻 (technologist)
- Polecat: 😺 (happy cat)

Icons now show in:
- tmux status lines for all agent types
- gt status rig indicators
- gt witness status output
- gt agents popup menu
